name: Vault Minerals Limited
analysis: VAU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 29% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$4.4300, stop A$3.6333, target A$4.9000 (0.59:1) — then trail it.
